name: Chocolate Leaf Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Make the flaky pastry pie dough.
- In a large bowl, combine flour and salt. Cut in shortening until mixture resembles coarse meal with some pieces of shortening visible as corn kernels.
- Sprinkle 5 tablespoons ice water over the mixture, tossing to moisten evenly.
- Gather dough into a ball. If dry, add up to 1 tablespoon more ice water.
- Divide dough in half and pat each piece into a 6-inch disk. Wrap separately in plastic wrap and refrigerate at least 30 minutes.
- Roll out one piece on floured surface and fit into pie plate. With other piece of dough, roll out and cut leaf patterns with light vein-like designs. Fit onto pie plate and freeze.
- Pre-bake at 350°F until golden.
2. Make the chocolate filling.
- Simmer heavy cream with scraped vanilla bean.
- Add melted chocolate and sugar.
